gigapan.description:
A fellow named Jake rode up to me on his bike and said "Fresh fruit for a rotton vegatable?"

I didn't understand.

He continued 'don't you feel just a little bit rotten right now?'  And he gave me an asian pear.

Taken Sunday 8/30, before the gates opened.
